hero.title: Parking Expense Tracker
hero.description: A protected workspace for parking locations, parking sessions, payment methods, vehicles, notes, and monthly parking spend.

flow.title: Parking Expenses → Parking Locations → Insights
steps: Record parking sessions with amount, duration, vehicle, purpose, and payment method
Maintain reusable parking locations with city, area, type, and default hourly rate
Filter expenses by vehicle, payment method, and date range
Review monthly spending, location totals, payment totals, and average cost

differences.title: Parking spend without reservation or payment scope
differences.description: Parking Expense Tracker keeps user-entered parking costs organized without trying to reserve spaces, process payments, or replace official parking receipts.

items.title: Expense records
items.description: Save parking date, time range, calculated duration, amount, currency, vehicle, purpose, and notes.

items.title: Location memory
items.description: Keep repeated parking places with city, area, type, rate, and notes.

items.title: Cost review
items.description: See totals, monthly spending, average visit cost, and breakdowns by payment method and location.

feel.title: A compact parking ledger for everyday mobility
feel.description: The workflow is designed for commuters, families, and frequent drivers who need a private record of recurring parking spend.

items.title: Fast entry
items.description: The first workflow screen opens directly to parking expense capture.

items.title: Reusable
items.description: Locations reduce repeated typing for common malls, offices, airports, and street parking.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No reservation, payment, receipt forwarding, or official reimbursement workflow is included.

audiences.title: Who uses Parking Expense Tracker
audiences.description: Parking Expense Tracker supports people who want a clear private view of parking costs.

items.title: Commuters
items.description: Track office, mall, and street parking costs over time.

items.title: Families
items.description: Review parking spend across vehicles and regular destinations.

items.title: Frequent drivers
items.description: Compare locations, payment methods, sessions, and monthly totals.

resourceSection.title: Parking expense essentials
resourceSection.description: The app is a user-entered recordkeeping workflow, not a parking marketplace.

items.title: Parking expenses
items.description: Capture amount, date, time, duration, vehicle, payment method, purpose, and notes.

items.title: Parking locations
items.description: Maintain reusable locations with city, area, parking type, and default hourly rate.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review totals, monthly activity, payment breakdown, and location breakdown.

groupedSection.title: A simple spend-tracking workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports a specific parking cost job without expanding into parking reservations or payments.

items.name: Parking Expenses
items.description: Create, edit, delete, search, filter, and review parking sessions.

items.name: Parking Locations
items.description: Create, edit, delete, search, and review reusable parking location cards.

items.name: Insights
items.description: See total spend, monthly activity, payment methods, locations, sessions, and average cost.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Parking Expense Tracker follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated tables.

finalCta.title: Open Parking Expense Tracker
finalCta.description: Start with expenses, then organize locations and review parking insights.
